question_text: A seesaw is balanced with a child sitting on each end. Which of these would make the seesaw unbalanced?

options.label: A
options.text: One child moving closer to the pivot

options.label: B
options.text: Both children staying in the same positions

options.label: C
options.text: Both children moving the same distance from the pivot

explanation: Moving a child closer to the pivot reduces the moment on that side because moment depends on both the force and the distance from the pivot. This unbalances the seesaw.
